widgets_values:
[Watch this Tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AI9-1G7niXY&t=498s) for information on how to use the Animate Path node.

> **Note:** Video length value needs to be `16 × number of seconds + 1`

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: a white tiger elegantly lays still in the middle of a concrete structure

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走,过曝，
